PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FROM JAN-28-2019 TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON JAN-10-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506.
ORDER RE: ADVANCE OF COURT DATE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONSON, SARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHN DE BENEDETTI OF THE DE BENEDETTI FAMILY TRUST $5,070.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,160.00, DEFENDANT MAY RETAIN $2000 FOR WALL DAMAGE. DEFENDANT DID NOT GIVE PLAINTIFF AN ADEQUATE OPPORTUNITY TO CORRECT DAMAGE AND TOOK POSSESSION AND REPAIRED THE DAMAGE BEFORE THE AGREED LEASE TERMINATION DATE. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT CONTEST DEDUCTIONS FOR CLEANING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) (SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF) SERVED OCT-23-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN DE BENEDETTI OF THE DE BENEDETTI FAMILY TRUST

Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-05-2018 Continued To Jan-28-19 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff: Sara Monson, (415)767-9604
Defendant: John De Benedetti, (415)307-7774

Case is called at 10:30am. Defendant: John De Benedetti made a verbal request in open court for some one to assist him by reading the Plaintiff's evidence to him before it is presented to the Judge.

Court continues the matter to Jan-28-2019 @ 8:30am to proceed with trial. The Defendant and Plaintiff were advised to be in the hall outside of Dept. 506 at 8:15 for the document/evidence exchange assisted by the ADA Assistant prior to the hearing.

Judge Christine Van Aiken; Clerk Robert Sahatjian; Not Reported; D506.
